ocr_findings.description: Eye/iris closeup illustration (虹彩・瞳孔 diagram) replaced by 'img-0.jpeg' placeholder. Labels '虹彩' and '瞳孔' visible in image but absent from OCR text body — however these terms appear in the surrounding prose.

reviewer_notes: Page 15-06 物理的セキュリティ対策: バイオメトリクス認証 and 本人拒否率/他人受入率 sections. All definitional body text is accurately captured including the tradeoff explanation. The eye diagram label terms (虹彩, 瞳孔) are mentioned in surrounding prose so content loss is minimal.
